## Summary

Describe what this pull request adds or changes.

## Type of Change

- [ ] New prompt
- [ ] Prompt improvement
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Category or structure change
- [ ] Other

## Checklist

- [ ] The prompt solves a real workflow.
- [ ] The file uses lowercase kebab-case.
- [ ] The prompt follows `prompts/_template.md`.
- [ ] Placeholders are documented.
- [ ] Expected output is defined.
- [ ] Assumptions, risks, or limitations are noted where relevant.
- [ ] The prompt does not duplicate an existing prompt.
- [ ] Tool-specific behavior is clearly marked if relevant.

## Notes for Reviewers

Mention anything reviewers should pay special attention to.
